name: Do I need a lawyer for Google AI Overview damaging my Chicago business?
description: Yes, for navigating Section 230 and evidence rules.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for Google AI Overview damaging my Chicago business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for navigating Section 230 and evidence rules.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, due to complex Section 230 defenses and tech-specific issues.[3] Self-filing risks dismissal. Key factors: Jurisdiction nuances (IL consumer laws); evidence burden; Google’s resources. Start with free consults from IL tech attorneys. Early advice prevents mistakes.
